description.en: Design a personal memory architecture for your OpenClaw agent: persistent context in Memory.md, episodic notes in /memory, QMD for retrieval (keyword, semantic, reranking), and a justified MEMORY_DESIGN.md — with fresh-session recall demonstrated.
description.es: Diseña una arquitectura de memoria personal para tu agente OpenClaw: contexto persistente en Memory.md, notas episódicas en /memory, QMD para recuperación (keyword, semántica, reranking) y un MEMORY_DESIGN.md justificado — con demostración de recall en sesión nueva.

sharing.en: I just completed Give Your Agent a Memory with LearnPack @4GeeksAcademy. Check it out: https://github.com/4GeeksAcademy/ai-engineering-syllabus/tree/main/content/projects/openclaw-memory #AIEngineering #LearnPack #4GeeksAcademy #openclaw #qmd #agentmemory
